Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server

Annotation Interface Mixin

@Target({}) @Retention(RUNTIME) public @interface Mixin
Rich mixin definition for the @Rest(mixinDefs=...) attribute.

Declares a mixin class and lets the host override selected @Rest-level settings for that mixin's mixed-in endpoints — in one place, without subclassing or editing the mixin class. This is the host-side complement to @Rest(mixins=...) (which takes bare classes and offers no override hook).

Example:

@Rest( mixinDefs=@Mixin(type=FooMixin.class, guards=AdminGuard.class) ) public class MyResource { ... }

Here AdminGuard is applied to FooMixin's endpoints as declared by the host, without FooMixin having to declare it.

Override semantics

The override slots mirror the same @Rest attributes and resolve through the existing host→mixin inheritance chain, exactly as if the value had been declared on the mixin class itself, but at the most-derived position so a host override wins over the mixin class's own same-property declaration:

  • List-shaped (guards, converters, encoders, serializers, parsers, responseProcessors, restOpArgs, default headers/attributes, produces/consumes) — appended after the host chain that the mixin inherits.
  • Replace-shaped (callLogger, partSerializer, partParser, debug, defaultAccept/defaultContentType/defaultCharset, maxInput, roleGuard/rolesDeclared, messages) — the host override wins when set.

noInherit() is the @Mixin's own inheritance-cutoff list, applied to this mixin's sub-context: a token here cuts the host→mixin inheritance walk for that property (same token set as Rest.noInherit()). The host override is authoritative but overridable by these noInherit rules — e.g. @Mixin(type=X.class, noInherit="guards") removes the host's guard chain from X's endpoints entirely.

path()/paths() re-mount the mixin's endpoints under host-chosen prefix(es).

See Also:
  • Rest.mixinDefs()
  • Rest.mixins()
Since:
10.0.0

  • Required Element Summary

    Required Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Required Element
    Description
    Class<?>
    type
    The mixin class to compose into the host resource.

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    Class<? extends CallLogger>
    callLogger
    Host-declared callLogger override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String[]
    consumes
    Host-declared consumes override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Class<? extends RestConverter>[]
    converters
    Host-declared converters override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Debug
    debug
    Host-declared debug override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String
    defaultAccept
    Host-declared defaultAccept override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String
    defaultCharset
    Host-declared defaultCharset override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String
    defaultContentType
    Host-declared defaultContentType override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String[]
    defaultRequestAttributes
    Host-declared defaultRequestAttributes override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String[]
    defaultRequestHeaders
    Host-declared defaultRequestHeaders override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String[]
    defaultResponseHeaders
    Host-declared defaultResponseHeaders override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Class<? extends Encoder>[]
    encoders
    Host-declared encoders override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Class<? extends RestGuard>[]
    guards
    Host-declared guards override for this mixin's endpoints (appended after the host chain).
    String
    maxInput
    Host-declared maxInput override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String
    messages
    Host-declared messages override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String[]
    noInherit
    Inheritance-cutoff list for this mixin's sub-context.
    Class<?>[]
    parsers
    Host-declared parsers override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Class<? extends HttpPartParser>
    partParser
    Host-declared partParser override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer>
    partSerializer
    Host-declared partSerializer override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String
    path
    Host-chosen single mount prefix for this mixin's endpoints (re-mount).
    String[]
    paths
    Host-chosen multi-mount prefixes for this mixin's endpoints (re-mount).
    String[]
    produces
    Host-declared produces override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>[]
    responseProcessors
    Host-declared responseProcessors override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Class<? extends RestOpArg>[]
    restOpArgs
    Host-declared restOpArgs override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String
    roleGuard
    Host-declared roleGuard override for this mixin's endpoints.
    String
    rolesDeclared
    Host-declared rolesDeclared override for this mixin's endpoints.
    Class<? extends Serializer>[]
    serializers
    Host-declared serializers override for this mixin's endpoints.

  • Element Details

    • type

      Class<?> type
      The mixin class to compose into the host resource.

      Required. Equivalent to a bare entry in Rest.mixins(), but with the override slots below.

      Returns:
      The mixin class.

    • guards

      Class<? extends RestGuard>[] guards
      Host-declared guards override for this mixin's endpoints (appended after the host chain).
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • roleGuard

      String roleGuard
      Host-declared roleGuard override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rolesDeclared

      String rolesDeclared
      Host-declared rolesDeclared override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • converters

      Class<? extends RestConverter>[] converters
      Host-declared converters override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • encoders

      Class<? extends Encoder>[] encoders
      Host-declared encoders override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • serializers

      Class<? extends Serializer>[] serializers
      Host-declared serializers override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • parsers

      Class<?>[] parsers
      Host-declared parsers override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • responseProcessors

      Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>[] responseProcessors
      Host-declared responseProcessors override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • restOpArgs

      Class<? extends RestOpArg>[] restOpArgs
      Host-declared restOpArgs override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • callLogger

      Class<? extends CallLogger> callLogger
      Host-declared callLogger override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.CallLogger.Void.class

    • partSerializer

      Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> partSerializer
      Host-declared partSerializer override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.HttpPartSerializer.Void.class

    • partParser

      Class<? extends HttpPartParser> partParser
      Host-declared partParser override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.HttpPartParser.Void.class

    • debug

      Debug debug
      Host-declared debug override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      @org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Debug

    • messages

      String messages
      Host-declared messages override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • defaultRequestHeaders

      String[] defaultRequestHeaders
      Host-declared defaultRequestHeaders override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

      Host-declared defaultCharset override for this mixin's endpoints.

    • maxInput

      String maxInput
      Host-declared maxInput override for this mixin's endpoints.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • path

      String path
      Host-chosen single mount prefix for this mixin's endpoints (re-mount).
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • paths

      String[] paths
      Host-chosen multi-mount prefixes for this mixin's endpoints (re-mount).
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • noInherit

      String[] noInherit
      Inheritance-cutoff list for this mixin's sub-context.

      Each token names a property whose host→mixin inheritance walk is cut for this mixin (same token set as Rest.noInherit()). Authoritative over the host override slots above.

      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}
